title: Achievements
description: Understand achievement milestones and practical ways to approach them in regular play.
summary: Achievement milestones are designed to support long-form progression and replay consistency.
sourceNotes: Achievement list uses the titles exposed in the app overview data.
Exact completion criteria should be confirmed against latest app build telemetry.

sections.heading: Achievement goals
paragraphs: Achievements help turn short sessions into clear targets.
Track progress in small increments and convert milestones into repeatable play patterns.

sections.heading: How to progress
paragraphs: Pick one milestone at a time and complete it over multiple runs.
Use score and session planning together to avoid burnout and keep progression measurable.
bullets: Prioritise one target metric per session
Review whether each attempt moves performance forward
Use a repeatable warm-up before milestone attempts

faq.question: How are achievements unlocked in ZXSnake?
faq.answer: Achievements are unlocked by meeting gameplay milestones tracked by the game service.

faq.question: Are achievements tied to one session?
faq.answer: No. They are cumulative and designed to reflect repeated play over time.
